keywords: anchor bolts suppliers Africa, J-bolt China manufacturer, foundation bolts Africa, construction anchor bolts, post anchor bolts

heading.en: Types of Anchor Bolts for Africa Projects

body.en:
Anchor bolts are critical components for securing structures to concrete foundations. Common types:

L-Bolts (J-Bolts): L-shaped bolts cast into concrete, used for columns, structural steel
J-Bolts: Hooked end prevents pullout, ideal for holding down equipment
Straight Rod Anchor Bolts: Threaded rods with nut and washer on exposed end
Plate Anchor Bolts: Rectangular plate welded to rod, embedded in concrete
Swedge Bolts: Deformed bars for shear transfer in concrete

TradeGo manufactures all types to ASTM F1554 or customer specifications.

Standard specifications for construction anchor bolts:

ASTM F1554 (Standard Specification for Anchor Bolts):
- Grade 36: 58 ksi min tensile (most common for construction)
- Grade 55: 75 ksi min tensile
- Grade 105: 105 ksi min tensile

Material: Carbon steel A36/A307 or alloy steel
Thread: UNC thread per ANSI/ASME B1.1
Coating: Hot-dip galvanized (500-600 g/m²) for corrosion protection
Length: 6" to 48" standard (custom lengths available)
Diameters: M16 (5/8") to M36 (1-1/2")

TradeGo anchor bolts meet ASTM F1554 Grade 36 as standard, with hot-dip galvanizing for durability in African climate conditions.

Anchor bolts used in African construction projects:

1. Pre-Engineered Metal Buildings: Securing columns and beams to concrete foundations
2. Solar Panel Mounting: Ground-mounted solar panel structures
3. Transmission Towers: Lattice towers for power transmission
4. Telecom Towers: Cell towers and antenna structures
5. Industrial Equipment: Securing machinery to factory floors
6. Bridge Construction: Securing bridge components to concrete
7. Warehouses: Structural steel frame connections

TradeGo has supplied anchor bolts for major infrastructure projects in Kenya, South Africa, and Nigeria.

FOB Shanghai/Ningbo prices for hot-dip galvanized anchor bolts:

L-Bolts/J-Bolts M16 x 300mm:
- 100 pcs: $8-12/pc
- 500 pcs: $6-10/pc
- 2000+ pcs: $5-8/pc

Straight Rod Anchor Bolts M20 x 600mm:
- 100 pcs: $12-18/pc
- 500 pcs: $10-15/pc
- 2000+ pcs: $8-12/pc

Custom lengths and sizes quoted upon request.

CIF pricing to major African ports (Durban, Lagos, Mombasa, Dar es Salaam) available.
